name: @growthos/ai-service
description: Python FastAPI health, configuration, and AI-provider interface shell.

scripts.test:unit: python3 -m pytest -m 'not integration and not e2e'
scripts.clean: python3 -c "import shutil; [shutil.rmtree(p, ignore_errors=True) for p in ['.mypy_cache','.pytest_cache','.ruff_cache','build','dist']]"
